desc: You feel awake, your thoughts are clear.
You catch yourself having vivid daydreams.
Reality comes to you in what feels like snaps out of sleepwalks.
You are trapped in a dream of which you are not the dreamer.

name: Suffocating
desc: You try to breathe but nothing fills your lungs.
